metadata.source: Historical archives, government gazettes, and economic histories of Vietnam
metadata.description: Comprehensive dataset of Vietnamese actors driving technical change. Batch 1 of 5.
metadata.introduction: A granular view of the dynamics structuring technical change in Vietnam. This batch covers foundational state apparatus, national academies, major universities, and key heavy industry/technology firms. Events are detailed to show strategic evolution, not just inception.

actors.name: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST)
actors.description: Principal government body for state management of science, technology, and industrial strategy.

events.description: Established as State Committee for Sciences, initiating state-led R&D.
Merged environmental oversight, becoming Ministry of Science, Technology and Environment.
Issued 'National Policy on Hi-Tech Parks', creating legal framework for tech zones.
Spun off environment portfolio; focused exclusively on S&T industrial application.
Promulgated the 'Strategy for Science and Technology Development 2020'.

actors.name: Vietnam Academy of Science and Technology (VAST)
actors.description: National umbrella organization for basic and applied research institutes.

events.description: Founded as Vietnam Academy of Sciences post-unification.
Granted autonomy in research planning and international cooperation.
Established VAST Investment and Technology Transfer Company (VITTY) to commercialize research.
Renamed VAST; granted special financial autonomy to operate like a national university.
Master plan approved for Hoa Lac High-Tech Park headquarters relocation.

actors.name: Vietnam National University, Hanoi (VNU)
actors.description: Premier university complex for training technical elites.

events.description: Founded as Indochina University, introducing Western science curricula.
Split into University of Hanoi and Hanoi Polytechnic to focus on specific disciplines.
Reorganized into Vietnam National University, merging University of Hanoi and Hanoi National Pedagogical University.
Government approved master plan for Hoa Lac campus, shifting to a research-intensive model.

actors.name: Viettel Group
actors.description: Military-run conglomerate, Vietnam's largest telecom and tech firm.

events.description: Established as SIGELCO (Signal and Electronics Company) to repair military comms.
Rebranded to Military Electronics and Telecommunications Company (Viettel).
Launched 098 mobile network, first mass-market telecom service.
Invested in Cambodia (Metfone), marking first overseas tech expansion.
Pivoted to 'Make in Vietnam' strategy, launching military-grade cybersecurity products.
Officially banned Chinese 5G equipment in favor of domestic testing.

actors.name: VinFast
actors.description: National automotive brand driving high-tech manufacturing.

events.description: Established by Vingroup with focus on automotive industry.
Construction of Hai Phong manufacturing complex completed in 21 months.
First commercial ICE vehicles (Lux A2.0, SA2.0) rolled off assembly line.
Announced total cessation of ICE production to become pure-play EV manufacturer.
Opened V-Green global EV charging network standard to public.

actors.name: Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST)
actors.description: The 'cradle' of Vietnamese engineers, established with Soviet assistance.

events.description: Founded as Polytechnic University of Vietnam with Soviet technical aid.
Evacuated to mountainous areas due to US bombing; continued training in bunkers.
Selected as one of first universities to pilot autonomy in enrollment and finance.
Designated as 'Key National University' for industrial R&D.

actors.name: Petrovietnam (PVN)
actors.description: State-owned oil and gas giant, major revenue source for technical development.

events.description: General Department of Oil and Gas established to take over assets from 'Saigon regime'.
First Vietnam-Soviet joint venture (Vietsovpetro) established for offshore extraction.
Transformed into Vietnam Oil and Gas Group (Economic Group model).
Dung Quat Refinery commissioned, achieving first domestic oil refining capability.
Ca Nanh Oil Refinery project cancelled due to technology obsolescence concerns.

actors.name: Vietnam National University, Ho Chi Minh City (VNU-HCM)
actors.description: Largest university system in the South, driving industrial R&D.

events.description: Established by merging 9 existing universities and research institutes in HCMC.
Piloted 'Innovation Fund' to support student startups and tech transfer.
Opened 'AI Research and Application Center' in collaboration with multinational firms.

actors.name: Ministry of Planning and Investment (MPI)
actors.description: Architect of the 5-Year Plans and Doi Moi reforms.

events.description: State Planning Commission established to centralize resource allocation.
Issued Directive 259/CT allowing 'bunging out' (planned market experiments) for industrial units.
Key architect of Doi Moi (Renovation) policy at 6th Party Congress.
Drafted first Law on Foreign Investment, opening doors to FDI technology transfer.

actors.name: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT)
actors.description: Regulates industrial sectors, trade, and energy efficiency.

events.description: Formed by merging Ministry of Industry and Ministry of Trade to streamline policy.
Issued Decision 2068/QD-TTg approving 'National Energy Efficiency Programme (VNEEP) Phase 3'.
Launched online public service portal for industrial certification.

actors.name: FPT Corporation
actors.description: Leading technology company in software outsourcing.

events.description: Founded as 'The Food Processing Technology Company' (Food technology focus).
Shifted core business to Software Outsourcing and Systems Integration.
Listed on Ho Chi Minh City Stock Exchange (FPT), raising capital for expansion.
Acquired RWE IT Slovakia, marking major entry into European market.
Launched 'FPT Smart Cloud' to provide AI and Cloud services.

actors.name: Vietnam Electricity (EVN)
actors.description: State-owned utility critical for industrial capacity.

events.description: Established as Vietnam Electricity Corporation, consolidating regional grids.
Transitioned to one-member limited liability company; unbundled generation and transmission.
Son La Hydropower Plant (largest in SE Asia) fully operational.
First 500kV North-South transmission line connected, stabilizing national grid.

actors.name: Vietnam National Space Center (VNSC)
actors.description: Responsible for satellite technology and space applications.

events.description: Established as Vietnam Space Technology Institute.
Inaugurated Vietnam National Satellite Centre with Japan ODA support.
Successfully launched 'MicroDragon' satellite, fully developed by Vietnamese engineers.

actors.name: Ho Chi Minh City Hi-Tech Park (SHTP)
actors.description: Specialized zone for high-tech FDI and R&D.

events.description: Intel commenced construction of $1B chip assembly and test facility.
Established 'SHTP Labs' incubator for domestic semiconductor startups.
Founded as Hoa Phat Steel Trading Company Limited.
Commenced construction of Hoa Phat Steel Complex in Hai Duong.
Began production of high-quality steel pipes for construction.
Dung Quat 2 Steel Complex started operation, utilizing advanced blast furnace tech.

actors.name: Vietnam Academy of Agricultural Sciences (VAAS)
actors.description: Leading research body for agricultural innovation.

events.description: Consolidated 27 separate research institutes under VAAS.
Released rice variety 'OM18' with high salinity tolerance for Mekong Delta.
Piloted 'Autonomous Research Institute' model to commercialize patents.
General Department of Petroleum established in North Vietnam.
Held IPO, selling 2.35% stake to strategic investors.
Launched first modern LPG terminal in Thi Vai.

actors.name: Hoa Lac Hi-Tech Park
actors.description: National hub for technology incubation and research.

events.description: Approved by Prime Minister as National High-Tech Park.
FPT Software established main campus within the park.
Received $150M funding for infrastructure upgrade from Japan International Cooperation Agency (JICA).

actors.name: Vietnam Register (VR)
actors.description: Agency for registration and inspection of technical safety.

events.description: Established to ensure safety of maritime vessels.
Extended mandate to include road vehicle inspection and industrial equipment safety.
Implemented electronic registration system for maritime safety.

actors.name: General Statistics Office (GSO)
actors.description: Provides economic metrics and technical indicators for planning.

events.description: Established post-unification to unify data collection.
Adopted international standards (SNA93) for GDP calculation.
Conducted first digital population and housing census.

actors.name: Vietnam Chamber of Commerce and Industry (VCCI)
actors.description: Protects business interests and facilitates technology transfer events.

events.description: Founded in South Vietnam as Chamber of Commerce.
Merged with Northern Chamber to form national VCCI.
Launched 'Vietnam Business Forum' to lobby for tech-friendly investment laws.

actors.name: Da Nang University of Science and Technology
actors.description: Key technical university in Central Vietnam.

events.description: Became member of Da Nang University.
Opened 'Mechatronics and Automation Lab' in partnership with German universities.

actors.name: Can Tho University
actors.description: Core university for agricultural technology in the delta.

events.description: Founded as Can Tho Institute of Higher Learning.
Research team developed catfish breeding technology for high-density farming.

actors.name: Vingroup
actors.description: Largest private conglomerate driving real estate, tech, and industrialization.

events.description: Founded as Technocom in Ukraine (food processing).
Relocated to Vietnam; rebranded to Vingroup, shifting to real estate.
Launched Vinmec International Hospital, introducing private high-tech healthcare.
Announced shift to 'Technology-Industry' focus, establishing VinFast and VinSmart.
Established from Department General of Posts and Telecommunications.
Equitized and established member companies (VNPT-VinaPhone, VNPT-Net).
Launched first commercial 5G trial in Hanoi.

actors.name: Ministry of Construction (MOC)
actors.description: Regulates construction standards and urban technical infrastructure.

events.description: Issued decree on 'Energy Efficiency in Buildings', mandating green standards.
Implemented BIM (Building Information Modeling) standards for large projects.

actors.name: Vietnam Institute of Industrial Chemistry (VIIC)
actors.description: Research institute for industrial chemical applications.

events.description: Founded to support domestic chemical industry.
Shifted from pure research to contract research for SOEs.
Developed bio-fertilizer production technology for agricultural use.

actors.name: Institute of Energy (IE)
actors.description: Advises on national power development plans.

events.description: Drafted 'National Power Development Plan VII', prioritizing coal and renewables.
Released Draft PDP8 emphasizing wind and gas power shift.

actors.name: Vietnam Standards and Quality Institute (STAMEQ)
actors.description: Develops TCVN standards for industrial products.

events.description: Vietnam joined ISO; STAMEQ became national member body.
Harmonized 2,500 TCVN standards with ASEAN standards to facilitate trade.

actors.name: Masan Group
actors.description: Major player in food technology and mineral processing.

events.description: Founded as Masan Export Import Processing Trading Co Ltd.
Listed on HCMC Stock Exchange, raising capital for M&A.
Acquired Nui Phao Mining, integrating tungsten processing technology.

actors.name: Institute of Computing Science (ICS)
actors.description: Pioneering institute under VAST for computing research.

events.description: Established from reorganization of IT research centers.
Developed Vietnamese core banking software solution for Agribank.

actors.name: Vietnam Dairy Products Joint Stock Company (Vinamilk)
actors.description: Leading dairy firm with high-tech farming and processing.

events.description: Southern Milk-Coffee Company nationalized and renamed Southern Milk Company.
Opened first 'Green Farm' applying European-standard dairy farming tech.
Listed on Forbes Global 2000, recognized for supply chain innovation.

actors.name: Vietnam National Coal - Mineral Industries Group (Vinacomin)
actors.description: Dominant coal and mineral mining group.

events.description: Merged with Vietnam Minerals Corporation to form Vinacomin.
Adopted underground mining technology for deeper seams in Quang Ninh.
Delivered first 104,000 DWT bulk carrier built entirely in Vietnam.

actors.name: Dong Nai University of Technology (DNTU)
actors.description: Supports industrial zones in Dong Nai province.

events.description: Signed agreement with Samsung to train specialized technicians.
Established Tan Thuan EPZ, the first industrial zone in Vietnam.
Implemented 'One-Stop Shop' administrative mechanism to speed up licensing.

actors.name: Ministry of Transport (MOT)
actors.description: Oversees transport technical standards and construction.

events.description: Approved 'Strategy for Transport Development 2020' focusing on logistics technology.
Mandated ETC (Electronic Toll Collection) on all expressways.

actors.name: Vinh Tan Thermal Power Plant
actors.description: Major coal-fired power complex representing heavy industry.

events.description: Unit 1 synchronized to grid, adding 600MW capacity.
Faced local protests due to environmental pollution concerns.

actors.name: Vietnam Engine and Agricultural Machinery (VEAM)
actors.description: State-owned manufacturer of engines and machinery.

events.description: Established to centralize agricultural machinery production.
Signed joint venture with Toyota to produce trucks and buses.

actors.name: Truong Gia Binh
actors.description: Founder of FPT, pioneer of software industry.

events.description: Advocated for 'Party Resolution on IT Development'.
Donated personal shares to fund FPT University development.

actors.name: Pham Nhat Vuong
actors.description: Founder of Vingroup, driving force behind VinFast.

events.description: Founded Technocom in Ukraine, generating initial capital.
Listed VinFast on Nasdaq via SPAC merger.
Submitted 'Thien Ha Ke Sach' proposing railroads, telegraphs, and mining.
Reforms rejected by Imperial Court due to conservatism.

actors.name: Ho Chi Minh
actors.description: Founder of modern Vietnam, set strategy for scientific independence.

events.description: Established Committee for Research on Science.

actors.name: Luong Dinh Cua
actors.description: Pioneer of high-yield rice breeding in South Vietnam.

events.description: Developed 'IR8' adaptation for Mekong Delta conditions.
Continued work to help post-war food security.

actors.name: Tran Dai Nghia
actors.description: Founder of Vietnam's defense industry and military research.

events.description: Established first military workshop to manufacture bazookas.
Founded General Department of Military Engineering.
Gained autonomy under Ministry of Education and Training.

actors.name: Da Nang University of Technology
actors.description: Key engineering school in Central Vietnam.

events.description: Opened 'Drone Research Lab' for civil applications.

actors.name: Thai Nguyen University of Technology
actors.description: Technical university supporting Northern industrial zones.

events.description: Became member of Thai Nguyen University.
Established Key Lab for 'Nano Materials and Nano Technology'.
Developed bio-polymer materials for agricultural films.

actors.name: Institute of Biotechnology (IBT)
actors.description: Key institute for biotech applications in agriculture and health.

events.description: Successfully cloned a calf, a first for Vietnam.
Connected Vietnam to the Internet for the first time (pilot phase).

actors.name: Institute of Mechanics (IMECH)
actors.description: Research on applied mechanics for industry.

events.description: Developed simulation software for tsunami impact prediction.

actors.name: Vietnam Atomic Energy Institute (VAEI)
actors.description: Research center for nuclear science applications.

events.description: Dalat Nuclear Research Reactor achieved first criticality.
Government canceled Ninh Thuan nuclear power project; institute refocused on medical applications.
Hosted International Congress of Mathematicians in Vietnam.

actors.name: Institute of Geophysics
actors.description: Research on natural hazards and earth physics.

actors.name: Institute of Geology and Mineral Resources

events.description: Published 'Geology and Mineral Resources Map of Vietnam' at 1:200,000 scale.

actors.name: Institute of Geography
actors.description: Research on territorial organization and climate change.

events.description: Completed national GIS database for land use planning.

actors.name: Institute of Marine Environment and Resources
actors.description: Research on marine resources and coastal engineering.

events.description: Surveyed oil spill impact in Hai Phong coastal waters.

actors.name: Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology (HCMUT)
actors.description: Leading technical university in the South.

events.description: Founded as Phu Tho Technical Center.
Opened 'Automotive Engineering Center' with industry partners.

actors.name: University of Science (HUS)
actors.description: Key science faculty within VNU Hanoi.

events.description: Founded as Hanoi University of Science.
Integrated into VNU Hanoi administrative structure.

actors.name: University of Engineering and Technology (UET)
actors.description: Faculty of Technology within VNU Hanoi.

events.description: Established to focus on emerging tech fields.
Launched joint AI training program with Japanese universities.

actors.name: Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology (PTIT)
actors.description: Specialized training for the postal and telecom sector.

events.description: Origins in Indochina Postal Training School.

actors.name: Water Resources University (WRU)
actors.description: University for irrigation and water management.

events.description: Completed hydrological modeling for Mekong Delta climate adaptation.

actors.name: Hanoi University of Mining and Geology (HUMG)
actors.description: Trains engineers for mining and oil sectors.

events.description: Established joint training program with Schlumberger for petroleum engineering.

actors.name: University of Danang - University of Science and Technology
actors.description: Leading technical university in Central Vietnam.

events.description: Developed prototype for solar-powered desalination system.

actors.name: Vietnam Maritime University
actors.description: Training for maritime transport and navigation.

events.description: Installed ship handling simulator for training.
Released new soybean variety DT84 resistant to rust disease.

actors.name: Nong Lam University (NLU)
actors.description: Key university for agriculture in the South.

events.description: Developed bio-pesticide to replace chemical use in fruit farming.

actors.name: FPT University
actors.description: Private university focusing on IT training.

events.description: Opened Hoa Lac campus focusing on software engineering.

actors.name: RMIT Vietnam
actors.description: Foreign university bringing international tech standards.

events.description: Launched 'Swanston Academic Building' with green building technology.

actors.name: Vingroup Innovation Foundation (VinIF)
actors.description: Funds scientific research and talent development.

events.description: Awarded grants to 50 domestic AI and renewable energy projects.

actors.name: Vinmec Healthcare System
actors.description: Private hospital chain introducing advanced medical tech.

events.description: Opened Vinmec Times City, equipped with robotic surgery systems.

actors.name: VinUniversity
actors.description: Private non-profit university focusing on engineering and health.

events.description: Partnered with Cornell and Penn for curriculum design.

actors.name: Techcombank
actors.description: Bank financing industrial and tech projects.

events.description: Launched 'TCBusiness' digital banking platform for SMEs.

actors.name: VietinBank
actors.description: Major state bank for industrial financing.

events.description: Founded as Vietnam Bank for Industry and Trade.
IPO listed on HCMC Stock Exchange.
Converted to Joint Stock Commercial Bank.
Partnered with Honduras Telecom to launch 'HT Mobile' brand.

actors.name: Vietnam Airlines
actors.description: National flag carrier, adopting modern aviation tech.

events.description: Became first Southeast Asian carrier to operate Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner.

actors.name: Bamboo Airways
actors.description: Private airline driving tech adoption in aviation.

events.description: Launched operations using new Airbus A321neo fleet.

actors.name: Vietnam Railway Corporation (VNR)
actors.description: State operator of the railway network.

events.description: Piloted online ticketing system for North-South line.
Launched pilot project for electric bus manufacturing.
Opened Chu Lai Truong Hai Complex for localized truck production.
Installed waste heat recovery power generation at Hoang Thach plant.
Refinery mechanically completed; began commercial run.
Launched 'Solar Farm' solution for industrial zones.
Merged telecom infrastructure into national grid operations.

actors.name: CMC Telecom
actors.description: Private telecom and data center operator.

events.description: Launched Tier 3 Data Center in Hanoi.
Advised government on 'National Digital Transformation Program'.

actors.name: VUSTA
actors.description: Umbrella body for all science associations.

events.description: Launched consultation on 'Science and Technology Law' amendments.

actors.name: CIEM
actors.description: Researches market institutions and economic reform.

events.description: Submitted report on 'Institutional Reform for Industrial Revolution 4.0'.

actors.name: Institute of World Economy and Politics (IWEP)
actors.description: Researches global economic trends affecting tech.

events.description: Published impact assessment of WTO accession on industrial sectors.

actors.name: Vietnam National University of Forestry
actors.description: Trains experts for forestry and wood processing industry.

events.description: Developed technology for high-yield Acacia plantations.
Incorporated BIM training into core curriculum.

actors.name: University of Economics Ho Chi Minh City (UEH)
actors.description: Research on industrial policy and trade.

events.description: Provided research base for HCMC 'Socio-Economic Development Plan'.
Opened 'Incubation Center for IT and Telecom'.

actors.name: Vietnam Software and IT Services Association (VINASA)

events.description: Submitted strategy to make Vietnam a 'Software Powerhouse'.

actors.name: Vietnam Association of Seafood Exporters and Producers (VASEP)

events.description: Facilitated technology transfer for EU-standard processing lines.
Issued 'Green Strategy' for sustainable textile production.

actors.name: Vietnam Leather, Footwear and Handbag Association (LEFASO)

events.description: Promoted adoption of automated cutting technology.
Vietnam became 3rd largest electronics exporter in SE Asia.

actors.name: Ho Chi Minh City Computer Association (HCA)
Vietnam - Japan Human Resource Development Center (VJCC)

events.description: Trained 10,000th manager in Lean Manufacturing techniques.

actors.name: Vietnam-Korea Institute of Science and Technology (VKIST)
actors.description: Modeled after KIST Korea for applied R&D.

events.description: Established 5 key labs for sensor technology and new materials.

actors.name: Vietnam - Russia Tropical Centre
actors.description: Research on tropical technology and ecology.

events.description: Developed technologies for tropical medicine storage.

actors.name: National Agency for Technology Entrepreneurship and Commercialization Development (NATEC)

events.description: Launched 'First Venture' fund for tech startups.

actors.name: Ho Chi Minh City Department of Science and Technology
Hanoi Department of Science and Technology
Vietnam Oil and Gas Group (Petrovietnam) Technical Services Branch
actors.description: Provides technical services for offshore drilling.

events.description: Commissioned first domestically built offshore platform jacket.

actors.name: Vietnam Engine and Agricultural Machinery JSC (VEAM)

events.description: Signed technology transfer deal with Japanese partners for new combine harvesters.
Founded as An Giang Plant Protection.
Launched 'Rice Library' project to digitize farming data.
Commissioned sugar mill with capacity of 7,000 tons cane/day.
Modernized processing lines for Oolong tea export.
Invested in concentrated latex processing technology.

actors.name: Dong Thap Food Processing JSC (Dofoco)
actors.description: Processing of fish and agricultural products.

events.description: Faced anti-dumping tariffs; shifted technology to produce higher value added products.
Implemented GAP (Good Aquaculture Practices) standard farming.
Invested in uPVC pipe production line.
Achieved EU-GMP certification for production line.
Modernized extraction technology for herbal medicines.
Strategic partnership with Taisho Pharmaceutical (Japan) for tech transfer.
Certified for Boeing 787 heavy maintenance checks.
Built aviation fuel depot at Noi Bai Airport.

actors.name: Civil Aviation Authority of Vietnam (CAAV)
actors.description: Regulates aviation safety and tech standards.

events.description: Announced plan to integrate drones into civil airspace.
Opened Cau Gie - Ninh Binh expressway with ETC system.

actors.name: Cuong Thuan Idico Development Investment JSC

events.description: Invested in smart lighting systems for urban areas.
Upgraded water treatment plant with Japanese ODA technology.
Reduced non-revenue water rate to 30% via SCADA system.

actors.name: Vietnam Urban and Industrial Zone Development Investment Corporation (IDICO)

events.description: Opened float glass plant using German technology.
Expanded fiber optic cable production capacity.
Adopted BIM technology for project management.
Completed construction of National Convention Center.

actors.name: Vietnam Urban and Industrial Zone Investment and Development (IDICO)

events.description: Built infrastructure for Pho Noi Textile and Garment Industrial Zone.
Opened Vietnam-Singapore Industrial Park II (VSIP II).
First VSIP launched in Binh Duong.
Built Tier 3 Data Center in HCMC.
Coordinated QR code payment standard across banks.

actors.name: Bank for Foreign Trade of Vietnam (Vietcombank)
Bank for Investment and Development of Vietnam (BIDV)
Sai Gon Thuong Tin Commercial Joint Stock Bank (Sacombank)
Vietnam International Commercial Joint Stock Bank (VIB)

events.description: Launched 'MyVIB' mobile app with cardless withdrawal.

actors.name: Tien Phong Commercial Joint Stock Bank (TPBank)
Vietnam Prosperity Joint Stock Commercial Bank (VPBank)

events.description: Partnered with OpenWay to launch digital card issuing.

actors.name: Military Commercial Joint Stock Bank (MBBank)
actors.description: Bank for military and industrial sectors.

events.description: Implemented ERP system for banking operations.

actors.name: Vietnam Technological and Commercial Joint Stock Bank (Techcombank)

events.description: Formed from merger of SCB, De Nhat, and Tin Nghia banks.
Divested non-core businesses to focus on port logistics.
Implemented cold chain logistics for pharmaceuticals.
Opened Nam Hai Dinh Vu port in Hai Phong.
Invested in bonded warehouse management software.
Integrated map technology for traffic avoidance.
Launched 'Buu Dien' public internet access points.

actors.name: Vietnam Post and Telecommunication Technology JSC (VPT)

events.description: Launched FTTH (Fiber to the Home) services.
Revenue reached $300M; expanded to US market.
Completed core banking integration for Agribank.
Partnered with Oracle for certified training.
Exported first batch of smartphones to US market.

actors.name: Viettel Military Industry and Telecoms Group

events.description: Converted to Military Industry and Telecoms Group model.
Provided first public Internet access in Vietnam.
Built Tier 3 Data Center for park tenants.

actors.name: Phu My Hung Urban Area
actors.description: New city center with tech infrastructure.

actors.name: Vietnam Association for Conservation of Nature and Environment (VACNE)
Vietnam Academy for Water Resources (VAWR)
actors.description: Leading research body for hydraulic engineering and water management infrastructure.

events.description: Reorganized into Vietnam Academy for Water Resources under Ministry of Agriculture.
Adopted GIS and remote sensing technology for Mekong Delta salinity mapping.

actors.name: Institute of Transport Science and Technology (ITST)
actors.description: Conducts research on transport infrastructure technology and standards.

events.description: Founded as Institute of Transport Science.
Developed quality control standards for high-speed railway ballast.
Completed technical feasibility study for North-South High-Speed Rail.

actors.name: National Institute for Science and Technology Policy and Strategy Studies (NISTPASS)
actors.description: Think tank under MOST providing strategic advice on S&T development.

events.description: Established under Ministry of Science, Technology and Environment.
Drafted the 'Strategy for Science and Technology Development 2010'.
Published assessment on 'Industry 4.0 Readiness of Vietnam'.

actors.name: Vietnam Institute of Meteorology, Hydrology and Climate Change (IMHEN)
actors.description: Researches climate change impacts and adaptation technologies.

events.description: Institute of Meteorology and Hydrology established.
Reorganized to include Climate Change focus.

actors.name: Institute for Building Science and Technology (IBST)
actors.description: National research body for construction materials and building technology.

events.description: Established as Institute of Building Science.
Developed national standards for high-strength concrete application.
Piloted green building certification system for urban areas.

actors.name: Vietnam Institute of Fisheries Economics and Planning (VIFEP)
actors.description: Plans and researches sustainable fisheries development technology.

events.description: Completed plan for offshore fishing fleet modernization.

actors.name: Department of Science and Technology - Da Nang
actors.description: Manages local S&T activities and urban tech pilots.

events.description: Established upon Da Nang becoming central municipality.
Launched 'Da Nang - Smart City' pilot project.

actors.name: Department of Science and Technology - Hai Phong
actors.description: Manages S&T for industrial port city.

events.description: Established local fund for biotechnology application in aquaculture.

actors.name: Department of Science and Technology - Can Tho
actors.description: Coordinates agricultural tech in Mekong Delta hub.

events.description: Coordinated drone surveillance project for rice pests.

actors.name: Department of Science and Technology - Dong Nai
actors.description: Manages tech for industrial manufacturing hub.

events.description: Issued incentives for high-tech waste treatment in industrial zones.

actors.name: Department of Science and Technology - Binh Duong
actors.description: Drives tech transfer in industrial zones.

actors.name: Department of Science and Technology - Ba Ria - Vung Tau
actors.description: Manages tech for oil & gas and port sectors.

events.description: Supported tech transfer for offshore gas pipeline maintenance.

actors.name: Vietnam National Textile and Garment Group (Vinatex)
actors.description: Parent company for state-owned textile enterprises.

events.description: Invested in first modern denim fabric mill in Northern Vietnam.
Divested from dyeing subsidiaries to reduce pollution, focusing on high-tech weaving.
Declared bankruptcy due to inability to compete with private sector tech.

actors.name: Vietnam National Chemical Group (Vinachem)
actors.description: Manages fertilizer and industrial chemical production.

events.description: Commenced construction of DAP fertilizer plant No. 2.
Initiated restructuring plan to divest non-core business units.

actors.name: Vinacomin - Institute of Mining Science and Technology (IMS)
actors.description: Researches coal mining technology and safety.

events.description: Developed coal bed methane (CBM) extraction technology.
Spun off from EVN as separate corporation.
Commissioned 500kV line connecting Southern and Northern grids.

actors.name: National Load Dispatch Center (NLDC)
actors.description: Manages real-time operation of national power system.

events.description: Implemented SCADA/EMS system for grid monitoring.
Launched smart grid pilot project in HCMC.
Discovered oil field in deepwater block.
Commissioned Nam Con Son gas pipeline.
Completed construction of Noi Bai Airport Terminal T2.
Initiated project to upgrade Hanoi - Vinh railway section.
Commercial operation of Metro Line 2A (Cat Linh - Ha Dong) began.

actors.name: Ho Chi Minh City Urban Rail Management Board

events.description: Construction started on Metro Line 1 (Ben Thanh - Suoi Tien).
Metro Line 1 commercial operation launched after delays.

actors.name: VNG Corporation
actors.description: Vietnam's leading internet company (Zalo, Game, Cloud).

events.description: Launched Zalo messaging app, dominating domestic market.
Expanded Zalo Cloud services for government administration.
Selected for pilot Mobile Money project in rural areas.
Adopted blockchain technology for shrimp traceability.
Shifted focus to processing wet-processed Arabica coffee.
Adopted Japanese automated noodle production lines.

actors.name: Chin-su Food Processing
actors.description: Leading sauce and condiment maker (Masan Consumer).

events.description: Opened modern condiment factory in Vu Bang Industrial Zone.
Installed waste heat recovery power generator.

actors.name: Vietnam Glass and Construction Ceramic JSC (Viglacera)

events.description: Opened float glass plant in Bac Ninh.
Installed high-frequency welding line for galvanized pipes.
Modernized rolling mill to increase capacity to 1M tons.
Contracted to supply interior parts for Toyota Vietnam.
Invested in modern water treatment plant for dyeing.
